positive: Minimalist geometric woodland scene: stylized silhouettes of diverse flora (ferns, mosses, wildflowers) and small woodland animals (fox, deer, rabbit) integrated into a repeating, interlocking pattern. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centrally focused, designed for repeating textile prints. Use a limited, natural color palette of sage green, forest teal, ochre yellow, and deep charcoal. The art style should be flat vector illustration with a strong, clean line art quality, reminiscent of negative space woodcuts, ensuring strong contrast and clear delineation between elements. High detail on the shapes, low detail on texture.
negative: photography, photorealistic, blur, noisy, artifacts, ugly, amateur, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, grain, low detail, disfigured
